option.name: filePath
option.value: $PROJECT_DIR$/01_Repaso_Fundamental/06_API_REST/Alquileres de coches/Solucion.md

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
**Recursos identificados:** - Usuario (users): Representa un usuario del sistema. - Coches (cars): Representa un coche del sistema. - Alquileres (rents): Representa un alquiler asociado a un usuario.
| Método Http | Endpoint | Query Params | Cuerpo JSON de la petición | Respuesta JSON de la petición | Códigos HTTP de respuesta posibles | |-------------|-----------------------|----------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------| | POST | /users | | `{ "name": "string", "email": "string", "password": "string" }` | `{ "id": "integer", "name": "string", "email": "string" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /users/{userId} | | | `{ "id": "integer", "name": "string", "email": "string" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /users/{userId} | | `{"password": "string" }` | `{ "id": "integer", "name": "string", "email": "string" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /users/{userId} | | | `{ "message": "User deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | GET | /cars | brand, model, fuel_type, transmission, seats | | `[ { "id": "integer", "brand": "string", "model": "string", "fuel_type": "string", "transmission": "string", "seats": "integer", "availability": "boolean" } ]` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users/{userId}/rents | | `{ "car_id": "integer", "rental_date": "string" }` | `{ "id": "integer", "user_id": "integer", "car_id": "integer", "rental_date": "string", "return_date": "string" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | GET | /users/{userId}/rents | | | `[ { "id": "integer", "user_id": "integer", "car_id": "integer", "rental_date": "string", "return_date": "string" }` ] | 200 OK, 404 Not Found |

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
**Recursos identificados:** - Usuario (users): Representa un usuario del sistema. - Coches (cars): Representa un coche del sistema. - Alquileres (rents): Representa un alquiler asociado a un usuario.
| Método Http | Endpoint | Query Params | Cuerpo JSON de la petición | Respuesta JSON de la petición | Códigos HTTP de respuesta posibles | |-------------|-----------------------|----------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------| | POST | /users | | `{ "name": "Juan Pérez", "email": "juan.perez@email.com", "password": "123456" }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Juan Pérez", "email": "juan.perez@email.com" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /users/{userId} | | | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Juan Pérez", "email": "juan.perez@email.com" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /users/{userId} | | `{ "name": "Juan P.", "email": "juan.p@email.com" }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Juan P.", "email": "juan.p@email.com" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /users/{userId} | | | `{ "message": "User deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | GET | /cars | brand, model, fuel_type, transmission, seats | | `[ { "id": 10, "brand": "Toyota", "model": "Corolla", "fuel_type": "Gasolina", "transmission": "Automático", "seats": 5, "availability": true }, { "id": 11, "brand": "Renault", "model": "Clio", "fuel_type": "Diésel", "transmission": "Manual", "seats": 5, "availability": true } ]` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users/{userId}/rents | | `{ "car_id": 10, "rental_date": "2025-08-05" }` | `{ "id": 100, "user_id": 1, "car_id": 10, "rental_date": "2025-08-05", "return_date": null }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | GET | /users/{userId}/rents | | | `[ { "id": 100, "user_id": 1, "car_id": 10, "rental_date": "2025-08-05", "return_date": null }, { "id": 101, "user_id": 1, "car_id": 11, "rental_date": "2025-08-10", "return_date": "2025-08-15" } ]` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found |

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
**Recursos identificados:** - Operaciones (operations): Representa las diferentes operaciones matemáticas que se pueden realizar, como suma, resta, multiplicación, división, potencia y raíz. | Método HTTP | URI | Query Params | Cuerpo de la Petición | Cuerpo de la Respuesta | Códigos de Respuesta | |----------------------------------------|--------------------------|---------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------| | POST | /operations | | `{ "type": "sum", "values": [2, 3, 4] }`
`{ "type": "sub", "values": [10, 4, 2] }`
`{ "type": "mul", "values": [2, 5, 3] }`
`{ "type": "div", "values": [20, 2, 2] }`
`{ "type": "pow", "values": [2], "n": 3 }`
`{ "type": "root", "values": [8], "n": 3 }` | `{ "id": 1, "type": "sum", "values": [2, 3, 4], "result": 9, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:00:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 2, "type": "sub", "values": [10, 4, 2], "result": 4, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:01:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 3, "type": "mul", "values": [2, 5, 3], "result": 30, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:02:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 4, "type": "div", "values": [20, 2, 2], "result": 5, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:03:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 5, "type": "pow", "values": [2], "n": 3, "result": 8, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:04:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 6, "type": "root", "values": [8], "n": 3, "result": 2, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:05:00Z" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /operations/{id} | | | `{ "id": 1, "type": "sum", "values": [2, 3, 4], "result": 9, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:00:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 2, "type": "sub", "values": [10, 4, 2], "result": 4, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:01:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 3, "type": "mul", "values": [2, 5, 3], "result": 30, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:02:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 4, "type": "div", "values": [20, 2, 2], "result": 5, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:03:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 5, "type": "pow", "values": [2], "n": 3, "result": 8, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:04:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 6, "type": "root", "values": [8], "n": 3, "result": 2, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:05:00Z" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | Consideraciones: - Observa como no atamos el endpoint a una operación de negocio concreta como "sumar" o "restar", sino que lo dejamos abierto a cualquier tipo de operación. Esto nos permite crear "operaciones" de forma genérica y reutilizable. - El campo `type` en el cuerpo de la petición indica el tipo de operación que se va a realizar, y el campo `values` contiene los números sobre los que se va a operar. - El campo `n` se utiliza para las operaciones de potencia y raíz, indicando el exponente o el índice de la raíz. - El campo `created_at` se utiliza para registrar la fecha y hora en que se creó la operación. A continuación, se muestra una solución alternativa donde se identifican los recursos de forma diferente. Nuestra calculadora ahora no maneja "operaciones", sino que maneja "sumas", "restas", "multiplicaciones", etc. Cada uno de estos recursos tiene su propio endpoint. De esta forma se mantiene la coherencia. Lo que no sería coherente sería tener un endpoint `/operations` que permita acceder a todas las operaciones, y luego tener un endpoint `/sum` que se encargue de crear las sumas. En este caso, se pierde la coherencia porque estamos mezclando recursos de forma inconsistente.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
**Recursos identificados:** - Operaciones (operations): Representa las diferentes operaciones matemáticas que se pueden realizar, como suma, resta, multiplicación, división, potencia y raíz. | Método HTTP | URI | Query Params | Cuerpo de la Petición | Cuerpo de la Respuesta | Códigos de Respuesta | |----------------------------------------|--------------------------|---------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------| | POST | /operations | | `{ "type": "sum", "values": [2, 3, 4] }`
`{ "type": "sub", "values": [10, 4, 2] }`
`{ "type": "mul", "values": [2, 5, 3] }`
`{ "type": "div", "values": [20, 2, 2] }`
`{ "type": "pow", "values": [2], "n": 3 }`
`{ "type": "root", "values": [8], "n": 3 }` | `{ "id": 1, "type": "sum", "values": [2, 3, 4], "result": 9, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:00:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 2, "type": "sub", "values": [10, 4, 2], "result": 4, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:01:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 3, "type": "mul", "values": [2, 5, 3], "result": 30, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:02:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 4, "type": "div", "values": [20, 2, 2], "result": 5, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:03:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 5, "type": "pow", "values": [2], "n": 3, "result": 8, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:04:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 6, "type": "root", "values": [8], "n": 3, "result": 2, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:05:00Z" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /operations/{id} | | | `{ "id": 1, "type": "sum", "values": [2, 3, 4], "result": 9, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:00:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 2, "type": "sub", "values": [10, 4, 2], "result": 4, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:01:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 3, "type": "mul", "values": [2, 5, 3], "result": 30, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:02:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 4, "type": "div", "values": [20, 2, 2], "result": 5, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:03:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 5, "type": "pow", "values": [2], "n": 3, "result": 8, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:04:00Z" }`
`{ "id": 6, "type": "root", "values": [8], "n": 3, "result": 2, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:05:00Z" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | Consideraciones: - Observa como no atamos el endpoint a una operación de negocio concreta como "sumar" o "restar", sino que lo dejamos abierto a cualquier tipo de operación. Esto nos permite crear "operaciones" de forma genérica y reutilizable. - El campo `type` en el cuerpo de la petición indica el tipo de operación que se va a realizar, y el campo `values` contiene los números sobre los que se va a operar. - El campo `n` se utiliza para las operaciones de potencia y raíz, indicando el exponente o el índice de la raíz. - El campo `created_at` se utiliza para registrar la fecha y hora en que se creó la operación. A continuación, se muestra una solución alternativa donde se identifican los recursos de forma diferente. Nuestra calculadora ahora no maneja "operaciones", sino que maneja "sumas", "restas", "multiplicaciones", etc. Cada uno de estos recursos tiene su propio endpoint. De esta forma se mantiene la coherencia. Lo que no sería coherente sería tener un endpoint `/operations` que permita acceder a todas las operaciones, y luego tener un endpoint `/sum` que se encargue de crear las sumas. En este caso, se pierde la coherencia porque estamos mezclando recursos de forma inconsistente. **Solución alternativa: endpoints por tipo de operación** | Método HTTP | Endpoint | Cuerpo de la Petición | Cuerpo de la Respuesta | Códigos de Respuesta | |-------------|----------------------|----------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------| | POST | /sums | `{ "values": [2, 3, 4] }` | `{ "id": 1, "values": [2, 3, 4], "result": 9, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:00:00Z" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /sums/{id} | | `{ "id": 1, "values": [2, 3, 4], "result": 9, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:00:00Z" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /subs | `{ "values": [10, 4, 2] }` | `{ "id": 2, "values": [10, 4, 2], "result": 4, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:01:00Z" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /subs/{id} | | `{ "id": 2, "values": [10, 4, 2], "result": 4, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:01:00Z" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /muls | `{ "values": [2, 5, 3] }` | `{ "id": 3, "values": [2, 5, 3], "result": 30, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:02:00Z" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /muls/{id} | | `{ "id": 3, "values": [2, 5, 3], "result": 30, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:02:00Z" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /divs | `{ "values": [20, 2, 2] }` | `{ "id": 4, "values": [20, 2, 2], "result": 5, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:03:00Z" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /divs/{id} | | `{ "id": 4, "values": [20, 2, 2], "result": 5, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:03:00Z" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /pows | `{ "values": [2], "n": 3 }` | `{ "id": 5, "values": [2], "n": 3, "result": 8, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:04:00Z" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /pows/{id} | | `{ "id": 5, "values": [2], "n": 3, "result": 8, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:04:00Z" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /roots | `{ "values": [8], "n": 3 }` | `{ "id": 6, "values": [8], "n": 3, "result": 2, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:05:00Z" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /roots/{id} | | `{ "id": 6, "values": [8], "n": 3, "result": 2, "created_at": "2025-08-05T10:05:00Z" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found |

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
**Recursos identificados:** - Películas (movies) - Salas (rooms) - Usuarios (users) - Reservas (bookings) - Pagos (payments)
| Método Http | Endpoint | Query Params | Cuerpo JSON de la petición | Respuesta JSON de la petición | Códigos HTTP de respuesta posibles | |-------------|----------------------------------|----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------| | POST | /movies | | `{ "title": "Matrix", "duration": 120, "genre": "Sci-Fi" }` | `{ "id": 1, "title": "Matrix", "duration": 120, "genre": "Sci-Fi" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | PATCH | /movies/{movieId} | | `{ "title": "Matrix Reloaded" }` | `{ "id": 1, "title": "Matrix Reloaded", "duration": 120, "genre": "Sci-Fi" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /movies/{movieId} | | | `{ "message": "Movie deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /rooms | | `{ "name": "Sala 1", "capacity": 100 }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Sala 1", "capacity": 100 }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | PATCH | /rooms/{roomId} | | `{ "capacity": 120 }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Sala 1", "capacity": 120 }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /rooms/{roomId} | | | `{ "message": "Room deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users | | `{ "name": "Ana", "email": "ana@email.com" }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Ana", "email": "ana@email.com" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | PATCH | /users/{userId} | | `{ "email": "ana.nueva@email.com" }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Ana", "email": "ana.nueva@email.com" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /users/{userId} | | | `{ "message": "User deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /bookings | | `{ "user_id": 1, "room_id": 1, "movie_id": 1, "seats": 2 }` | `{ "id": 1, "user_id": 1, "room_id": 1, "movie_id": 1, "seats": 2, "status": "reserved" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /bookings/{bookingId} | | `{ "seats": 3 }` | `{ "id": 1, "user_id": 1, "room_id": 1, "movie_id": 1, "seats": 3, "status": "reserved" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /bookings/{bookingId} | | | `{ "message": "Booking cancelled successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /payments | | `{ "booking_id": 1, "amount": 15.00, "method": "card" }` | `{ "id": 1, "booking_id": 1, "amount": 15.00, "method": "card", "status": "paid" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found |
Consideraciones: - Los endpoints PATCH permiten modificaciones parciales. - Las reservas y pagos están asociadas a usuarios, salas y películas mediante sus IDs. - Los mensajes de éxito y error son claros y específicos. - Los códigos de respuesta siguen el estándar RESTful.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
**Recursos identificados:** - Películas (movies) - Salas (rooms) - Usuarios (users) - Reservas (bookings) - Pagos (payments)
| Método Http | Endpoint | Query Params | Cuerpo JSON de la petición | Respuesta JSON de la petición | Códigos HTTP de respuesta posibles | |-------------|----------------------------------|----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------| | POST | /movies | | `{ "title": "Matrix", "duration": 120, "genre": "Sci-Fi" }` | `{ "id": 1, "title": "Matrix", "duration": 120, "genre": "Sci-Fi" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | PATCH | /movies/{movieId} | | `{ "title": "Matrix Reloaded" }` | `{ "id": 1, "title": "Matrix Reloaded", "duration": 120, "genre": "Sci-Fi" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /movies/{movieId} | | | `{ "message": "Movie deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /rooms | | `{ "name": "Sala 1", "capacity": 100 }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Sala 1", "capacity": 100 }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | PATCH | /rooms/{roomId} | | `{ "capacity": 120 }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Sala 1", "capacity": 120 }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /rooms/{roomId} | | | `{ "message": "Room deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users | | `{ "name": "Ana", "email": "ana@email.com" }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Ana", "email": "ana@email.com" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | PATCH | /users/{userId} | | `{ "email": "ana.nueva@email.com" }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Ana", "email": "ana.nueva@email.com" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /users/{userId} | | | `{ "message": "User deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users/{userId}/bookings | | `{ "room_id": 1, "movie_id": 1, "seats": 2 }` | `{ "id": 1, "user_id": 1, "room_id": 1, "movie_id": 1, "seats": 2, "status": "reserved" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /users/{userId}/bookings/{bookingId} | | `{ "seats": 3 }` | `{ "id": 1, "user_id": 1, "room_id": 1, "movie_id": 1, "seats": 3, "status": "reserved" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /users/{userId}/bookings/{bookingId} | | | `{ "message": "Booking cancelled successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users/{userId}/bookings/{bookingId}/payments | | `{ "amount": 15.00, "method": "card" }` | `{ "id": 1, "booking_id": 1, "amount": 15.00, "method": "card", "status": "paid" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found |
Consideraciones: - Los endpoints PATCH permiten modificaciones parciales. - Las reservas y pagos están asociadas a usuarios, salas y películas mediante sus IDs. - Los mensajes de éxito y error son claros y específicos. - Los códigos de respuesta siguen el estándar RESTful.

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
**Recursos identificados:** - Usuarios (users) - Restaurantes (restaurants) - Menús (menus) - Platos (dishes) - Pedidos (orders) - Pagos (payments)
| Método Http | Endpoint | Query Params | Cuerpo JSON de la petición | Respuesta JSON de la petición | Códigos HTTP de respuesta posibles | |-------------|------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------| | GET | /restaurants | location, cuisine | | `[ { "id": 1, "name": "Pizza House", "location": "Madrid", "cuisine": "Italiana" } ]` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus | | | `[ { "id": 1, "name": "Menú Principal" }, { "id": 2, "name": "Menú Vegano" } ]` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | GET | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus/{menuId}/dishes | | | `[ { "id": 10, "name": "Pizza Margarita", "price": 12.5, "available": true }, { "id": 11, "name": "Lasaña", "price": 14, "available": false } ]` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus | | `{ "name": "Menú Especial" }` | `{ "id": 3, "name": "Menú Especial" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | POST | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus/{menuId}/dishes | | `{ "name": "Calzone", "price": 13.5, "available": true }` | `{ "id": 12, "name": "Calzone", "price": 13.5, "available": true }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus/{menuId}/dishes/{dishId} | | `{ "available": false }` | `{ "id": 12, "name": "Calzone", "price": 13.5, "available": false }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus/{menuId}/dishes/{dishId} | | | `{ "message": "Dish deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users | | `{ "name": "Carlos", "email": "carlos@email.com" }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Carlos", "email": "carlos@email.com" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | POST | /users/{userId}/orders | | `{ "restaurant_id": 1, "dishes": [10, 12], "address": "Calle Mayor 1" }` | `{ "id": 100, "user_id": 1, "restaurant_id": 1, "dishes": [10, 12], "address": "Calle Mayor 1", "status": "pending" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /users/{userId}/orders/{orderId} | | `{ "dishes": [10, 11], "address": "Calle Nueva 2" }` | `{ "id": 100, "user_id": 1, "restaurant_id": 1, "dishes": [10, 11], "address": "Calle Nueva 2", "status": "pending" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /users/{userId}/orders/{orderId} | | | `{ "message": "Order cancelled successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | GET | /users/{userId}/orders/{orderId}/tracking | | | `{ "order_id": 100, "status": "preparing", "estimated_delivery": "2025-08-05T21:00:00Z" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users/{userId}/orders/{orderId}/payments | | `{ "amount": 25.00, "method": "card" }` | `{ "id": 1, "order_id": 100, "amount": 25.00, "method": "card", "status": "paid" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/orders/{orderId} | | `{ "status": "preparing" }` | `{ "id": 100, "restaurant_id": 1, "status": "preparing" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found |
Consideraciones: - El seguimiento de pedidos se realiza por usuario y pedido. - Los restaurantes pueden actualizar el estado de los pedidos recibidos. Observa que, en lugar de tener múltiples endpoints para cada estado, se utiliza un único endpoint PATCH para actualizar el estado del pedido.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
**Recursos identificados:** - Usuarios (users) - Restaurantes (restaurants) - Menús (menus) - Platos (dishes) - Pedidos (orders) - Pagos (payments)
| Método Http | Endpoint | Query Params | Cuerpo JSON de la petición | Respuesta JSON de la petición | Códigos HTTP de respuesta posibles | |-------------|------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------| | GET | /restaurants | location, cuisine | | `[ { "id": 1, "name": "Pizza House", "location": "Madrid", "cuisine": "Italiana" } ]` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus | | | `[ { "id": 1, "name": "Menú Principal" }, { "id": 2, "name": "Menú Vegano" } ]` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | GET | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus/{menuId}/dishes | | | `[ { "id": 10, "name": "Pizza Margarita", "price": 12.5, "available": true }, { "id": 11, "name": "Lasaña", "price": 14, "available": false } ]` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus | | `{ "name": "Menú Especial" }` | `{ "id": 3, "name": "Menú Especial" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | POST | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus/{menuId}/dishes | | `{ "name": "Calzone", "price": 13.5, "available": true }` | `{ "id": 12, "name": "Calzone", "price": 13.5, "available": true }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus/{menuId}/dishes/{dishId} | | `{ "available": false }` | `{ "id": 12, "name": "Calzone", "price": 13.5, "available": false }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/menus/{menuId}/dishes/{dishId} | | | `{ "message": "Dish deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users | | `{ "name": "Carlos", "email": "carlos@email.com" }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Carlos", "email": "carlos@email.com" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | POST | /users/{userId}/orders | | `{ "restaurant_id": 1, "dishes": [10, 12], "address": "Calle Mayor 1" }` | `{ "id": 100, "user_id": 1, "restaurant_id": 1, "dishes": [10, 12], "address": "Calle Mayor 1", "status": "pending" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /users/{userId}/orders/{orderId} | | `{ "dishes": [10, 11], "address": "Calle Nueva 2" }` | `{ "id": 100, "user_id": 1, "restaurant_id": 1, "dishes": [10, 11], "address": "Calle Nueva 2", "status": "pending" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /users/{userId}/orders/{orderId} | | | `{ "message": "Order cancelled successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | GET | /users/{userId}/orders/{orderId} | | | `{ "id": 100, "user_id": 1, "restaurant_id": 1, "dishes": [10, 12], "address": "Calle Mayor 1", "status": "preparing", "estimated_delivery": "2025-08-05T21:00:00Z" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users/{userId}/orders/{orderId}/payments | | `{ "amount": 25.00, "method": "card" }` | `{ "id": 1, "order_id": 100, "amount": 25.00, "method": "card", "status": "paid" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /restaurants/{restaurantId}/orders/{orderId} | | `{ "status": "preparing" }` | `{ "id": 100, "restaurant_id": 1, "status": "preparing" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found |
Consideraciones: - El seguimiento de pedidos se realiza por usuario y pedido. - Los restaurantes pueden actualizar el estado de los pedidos recibidos. Observa que, en lugar de tener múltiples endpoints para cada estado, se utiliza un único endpoint PATCH para actualizar el estado del pedido.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
**Recursos identificados:** - Espacios (spaces): espacio de trabajo individual, sala de reuniones, auditorio. - Reservas (bookings) - Eventos (events) - Usuarios (users)
| Método Http | Endpoint | Query Params | Cuerpo JSON de la petición | Respuesta JSON de la petición | Códigos HTTP de respuesta posibles | |-------------|--------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------| | GET | /spaces | location, date, type | | `[ { "id": 1, "type": "auditorio", "location": "Madrid", "capacity": 100 } ]` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request | | POST | /spaces | | `{ "type": "sala", "location": "Madrid", "capacity": 10 }` | `{ "id": 2, "type": "sala", "location": "Madrid", "capacity": 10 }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | PATCH | /spaces/{spaceId} | | `{ "capacity": 12 }` | `{ "id": 2, "type": "sala", "location": "Madrid", "capacity": 12 }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /spaces/{spaceId} | | | `{ "message": "Space deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /users/{userId}/bookings | | `{ "space_id": 2, "date": "2025-08-10", "hours": 2 }` | `{ "id": 10, "user_id": 1, "space_id": 2, "date": "2025-08-10", "hours": 2, "status": "reserved" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /users/{userId}/bookings/{bookingId} | | `{ "hours": 3 }` | `{ "id": 10, "user_id": 1, "space_id": 2, "date": "2025-08-10", "hours": 3, "status": "reserved" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /users/{userId}/bookings/{bookingId} | | | `{ "message": "Booking cancelled successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /events | | `{ "name": "Tech Meetup", "space_id": 1, "date": "2025-08-20" }` | `{ "id": 100, "name": "Tech Meetup", "space_id": 1, "date": "2025-08-20" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /events/{eventId} | | `{ "name": "Tech Meetup 2.0" }` | `{ "id": 100, "name": "Tech Meetup 2.0", "space_id": 1, "date": "2025-08-20" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /events/{eventId} | | | `{ "message": "Event deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found |
Consideraciones: - Los espacios pueden ser gestionados por administradores (crear, modificar, eliminar). - Los usuarios pueden reservar espacios y modificar/cancelar sus reservas. - Los eventos solo pueden crearse si el espacio asociado es un auditorio. - Los endpoints PATCH permiten modificaciones parciales. - Los mensajes y códigos de respuesta siguen el estándar RESTful.

option.name: filePath
option.value: $PROJECT_DIR$/01_Repaso_Fundamental/06_API_REST/Hunde la flota/Solucion.md

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
**Recursos identificados:** - Usuarios (users) - Partidas (games) - Jugadores de partida (players) - Barcos (ships) - Disparos (shots)
| Método Http | Endpoint | Query Params | Cuerpo JSON de la petición | Respuesta JSON de la petición | Códigos HTTP de respuesta posibles | |-------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|--------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------| | POST | /users | | `{ "name": "Pedro" }` | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Pedro" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | GET | /users/{userId} | | | `{ "id": 1, "name": "Pedro" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /users/{userId} | | | `{ "message": "User deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /games | | `{ "players": [1, 2] }` | `{ "id": 10, "players": [1, 2], "status": "created" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request | | PATCH | /games/{gameId} | | `{ "status": "started" }` | `{ "id": 10, "players": [1, 2], "status": "started" }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /games/{gameId} | | | `{ "message": "Game deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | PATCH | /games/{gameId}/finish | | `{ "winner": 1 }` | `{ "id": 10, "status": "finished", "winner": 1 }` | 200 OK, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | GET | /games/{gameId} | | | `{ "id": 10, "players": [1, 2], "status": "started", "winner": null, "ships": {...}, "shots": {...} }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /games/{gameId}/players/{playerId}/ships | | `{ "type": "destroyer", "positions": [ [0,0], [0,1], [0,2], [0,3] ] }` | `{ "id": 100, "type": "destroyer", "positions": [ [0,0], [0,1], [0,2], [0,3] ] }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found | | DELETE | /games/{gameId}/players/{playerId}/ships/{shipId} | | | `{ "message": "Ship deleted successfully" }` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | GET | /games/{gameId}/players/{playerId}/ships | | | `[ { "id": 100, "type": "destroyer", "positions": [ [0,0], [0,1], [0,2], [0,3] ] } ]` | 200 OK, 404 Not Found | | POST | /games/{gameId}/shots | | `{ "from": 1, "to": 2, "position": [5,7] }` | `{ "id": 200, "from": 1, "to": 2, "position": [5,7], "result": "hit" }` | 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found |
Consideraciones: - Los barcos se añaden y eliminan por jugador y partida. - Los disparos se registran por partida, indicando origen, destino y posición. - La consulta de partida devuelve todos los datos relevantes (jugadores, barcos, disparos, ganador). - Los endpoints PATCH permiten modificaciones parciales (estado de partida, finalizar partida). - Los mensajes y códigos de respuesta siguen el estándar RESTful.
